title: Pleuranthodium trichocalyx
taxonomy: Pleuranthodium trichocalyx is classified within the family Asphodelaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the asphodels or lilioids. This classification places Pleuranthodium trichocalyx among the monocots, a large and diverse group of plants. The genus Pleuranthodium is a part of the subfamily Asphodeloideae, which consists of plants native to Australia and other parts of the world. The species is further categorized as a member of the Asphodeloideae subfamily within the order Asparagales, a group of flowering plants that includes the lilies and orchids. This classification highlights the evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics of Pleuranthodium trichocalyx with other plants in its family and order.
